name: L1: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence
author: Ronald Kroening
description: An introduction to the field of Artificial Intelligence, and an overview of the concepts and branches of the field.

name: L1.5: History to Artificial Intelligence
author: Ronald Kroening
description: The history of Artificial Intelligence, from the initial mathematical framework to the current state of Artificial Intelligence.

name: L2: Introduction to Machine Learning
author: Ronald Kroening
description: Intoduction to Machine Learning, defining what makes a machine learning model, and examining the types of problems machine learning can solve and how it is possible.
